doc_title_en: Notice Regarding Cancellation of Treasury Shares (Share Cancellation under the Companies Act Article 178)

key_facts.reason_jp: 中期経営計画の進捗、財務状況の見通しや株価状況等を勘案し、資本政策の一環として

summary_en: 24,342,202 shares (13.1% of issued capital) to be cancelled effective 2026-05-29. Post-cancellation issued capital: 161,102,570 shares; treasury shares: 16,110,257 shares.
tag_en: Share cancellation - 24,342,202 shares (13.1% of outstanding) - effective 2026-05-29
tag_jp: 自己株式消却 - 24,342,202株（発行済株式の13.1%） - 2026年5月29日発効
